title: Kids Gardening Tools and Collapsible Bucket, Quality Kids Gardening Set Include Long Rake, Shovel, Spade and Foldable Bucket, Outdoor & Garden Toys for Kids Digging & Shoveling
features: 💪SUPER VALUE KIDS GARDENING TOOLS: These garden tools are designed for gardening. Includes a rake, flat shovel, pointed shovel, and collapsible bucket. Perfect for backyard gardening!

🌼CHILD SAFETY SHOVEL: The beach shovel is composed of an iron shovel head, a hardwood handle and a plastic grip. They are sturdy and durable, finely crafted and smooth appearance, which will not scratch children's hands.

🌟DETACHABLE KIDS SIZE SPADE SHOVEL: The shovel adopts a detachable design and easy to carry, easily pack in your beach bag. The length of the shovel is 28 inches, elaborate designed to fit children of age 3 up, making it easier and more comfortable to operate.

🌼COLLAPSIBLE CASTLE BUCKET: The upgraded bucket is made with thick and collapsible silicone, more durable and space saving then plastic bucket. The castle bucket can also be used as a mould to add fun. The maximum capacity of bucket is 2.6L.
🌈BRIGHT COLORS: Each gardening tool paint environment-friendly which is corrosion and rust resistant. The bright colors enhance the fun and excitement of outdoor play.

💪A GREAT HELPER for PROMOTING GROWTH: Kids gardening tools are not only a great tool for children to help tidy up their yards and learn life skills, but also a bridge to experience nature firsthand. Through outdoor activities, they can exercise their practical abilities, stimulate their desire to explore, and cultivate their sensory abilities.

🎁IDEAL GIFT: The children's shovel combines practicality, fun and aesthetics, making it the perfect gift for children. It is very suitable for kids to shovel sand on beach, garden, camping, etc. It is also suitable for adults to remove snow in winter, gardening, planting, etc.
